parameters.query:
INSERT INTO daily_history (type_id, region_id, date, average, volume, order_count)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
ON CONFLICT (type_id, region_id, date)
DO UPDATE SET average = EXCLUDED.average, volume = EXCLUDED.volume, order_count = EXCLUDED.order_count
SELECT type_id, name FROM watchlist WHERE status = 'active';
